name: Kay
description: Kitsune2 or K2 (real name Kay) is a member from HALLEY LABS who produces Chiptune and Chipcore music. He has known Mayhem (another member from HALLEY LABS) for as long as he can tell, and these two have long confided in one another regarding their homosexuality. Mayhem looks up to Kay’s composition skills and is very inspired by his music, though they rarely work together. Btw, Kay chose the name “Kitsune2” when he was a young weeaboo, using a machine translation service that suggested that "狐" meant "rat". His Friends started calling him by his real name so is trying to use the name "K2" more now because it’s less embarrassing. He also loves Pocky. His most recent album is called “Unrealistic Project Roadmap”, also I know he had a redesign but I’D RATHER JUMP OFF A CLIFF THAN USE THAT DESIGN.
creator: Macaroni3781
